'''Kenobi's Legacy''' was a [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]] which could be used in a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. It had to be properly tuned before it could be inserted into the lightsaber and once inserted meant that the saber could be used by no other.<ref name="SWG:KL" />

{{Stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Kenobi's Legacy appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:KL" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The crystal was made unavailable following the release of the [[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]], a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]], that totally revamped the Jedi profession.<ref name="PA2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
